text: Hi Sarah, so sorry for the late notice but I woke up with a fever and won't be able to watch the kids tomorrow, Tuesday July 7th. Hopefully I'll be back on my feet by Wednesday. - Jessica

ALERT: Due to a facilities issue, Junior Striker Soccer Camp is CANCELLED for Wednesday, July 8, 2026. All other sessions this week will run as scheduled. We apologize for the inconvenience. - Green Valley Soccer Team

Subject: Schedule Change - Astro Academy

Dear Parents,

Please note that Thursday's session (July 16) will start two hours late at 11:00 AM due to a staff training event. Pick-up time remains 3:00 PM.

Astro Academy Administration
Heads up - David texted that his car broke down and he can't do the Thursday afternoon sitting shift this week (July 23rd). He says he can make it up next week.

Subject: URGENT: Little Explorers closed Friday

Due to a water main break, Sunshine Preschool will be CLOSED on Friday, July 17, 2026. All Little Explorers sessions for that day are cancelled and will be refunded.

Subject: Green Valley Soccer Academy - Summer Newsletter

Hello soccer families! Check out photos from last week's sessions on our website, and don't forget our end-of-summer BBQ fundraiser. No action needed - just keeping you in the loop!
Hi Sarah, it was lovely to see you at the park on Saturday! We should get the kids together for a playdate sometime soon. Let me know what your summer looks like. - Amanda

Subject: Your invoice from Springville Utilities

Dear customer, your monthly statement of $84.20 is now available. Payment is due by August 1. Thank you for being a valued customer.
